$comment: LLM fixture used when MOCK_LLM=1. Seeded from CPA gpt-5.5 real responses on 2026-05-22; redact and regenerate by running a real prompt with MOCK_LLM unset. IMPORTANT: match.scenePromptIncludes is matched against the full `userPrompt` (built by clip-generate.ts buildUserPrompt — includes 'Scene prompt:', the duration line '\n\u65f6\u957f: Xs @ 30fps = ...', optional camera hint, the '\u98ce\u683c\u53c2\u8003:' (references) block, and the trailing '\u8bf7\u751f\u6210 Composition.tsx:'). NOT the raw user scene description. Inspect `.meta/last-generate.json:userPrompt` of any take to see the real string the matcher receives. To add a new entry: pick a substring unique to your target scene prompt (e.g. 'sunrise zoom-out') so it doesn't false-match the default. Entries are matched top-down; first match wins. `default` fires when no entry matches.
